angle: worst (k+1)-super-code construction; structured u1 vs average-term
governing_law: delta* = sup{ delta : I(delta) <= q*eps* }, I(delta)=max far-line incidence
bridge: I(delta) <= max over (k+1)-dim C+ ⊇ RS[k] of |list(C+, delta*n)|

key_theory.monomial_tower_is_MDS: u1=x^k gives super-code = RS[k+1], the MDS (max-distance) (k+1)-dim code; MDS => smallest list (Johnson tight). So the tower/monomial is NOT the worst super-code.
key_theory.tower_window_interior_incidence: RS[k+1] codeword vs center difference has degree <= k+1 => at most k+1 roots => tower list is O(n) in window interior (Johnson), and = 0 for any radius delta < 1-rho-1/n. Verified: at mu_12/F61, list ~440 at delta=0.67 (deepest) but drops to 0/1 at delta>=0.5.
key_theory.even_tower_deepband_lowerbound: C(n/2, j), j=(k+1)/2, is a DEEP-BAND (radius~1) phenomenon, not window-interior.
key_theory.tower_subaverage_at_deepband: tower deepest-band supply = zero-sum-(k+1)-subset count <= C(n,k+1) = the average-term (proven: towerDeepSupply_le_average). Antipodal lower bound C(n/2,j) <= C(n,2j)=C(n,k+1) (proven: antipodal_lower_le_average). Ratio C(n/2,j)/C(n,k+1) ~ n^{-(k+1)/2}: at n=1024,k=512 it is ~1e-154. Tower is EXPONENTIALLY sub-average.
key_theory.worst_supercode_is_min_distance: worst C+ MINIMIZES super-code distance d+. For mu_n above Sidon threshold (q~n*2^128 >> n^2) the distance deficit (n-k)-d+ is O(1) coords (no large additive structure), so the list advantage is O(1).

verdict: The structured even-tower / monomial / antipodal / subgroup super-code family does NOT beat the average-term by a super-constant factor. The tower/monomial direction is the MDS code => smallest list, sub-average; its only growth (C(n/2,j)) is at the deepest band and is still <= average there. The worst super-code is the MINIMUM-distance one, with O(1) distance deficit on mu_n above the Sidon threshold => O(1) list advantage. SUPPORTS concentration (delta*=average-term) ON THE STRUCTURED FAMILY. Does NOT close the open core: a low-distance structured C+ with a super-constant list advantage in the prize regime (q>>n) remains the open obstruction; small fields cannot certify the prize regime.
refutes: the even-tower / monomial / antipodal direction as a witness for delta* < average-term (the worst-super-code-via-tower route)
honesty: small-field probes regime-suspect; the proven Lean lemmas (towerDeepSupply_le_average, antipodal_lower_le_average) are field-independent and unconditional; the O(1)-distance-deficit claim on mu_n is the proven-elsewhere AdditiveEnergyResultant Sidon-threshold input, not re-derived here.
